content.en:
Terran Temple.

Ye Tian began to retreat to impact the peak realm god cultivation, this breakthrough is very important, once the breakthrough is successful, his strength will be greatly improved, maybe his combat power is not weaker than that of Yonghao realm god.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out one extradimensional resource after another, swallowed it in one gulp, absorbed the energy and poured into the Eternal Dao Seed, and then began to condense the tenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

As time passed, the tenth Eternal Realm Spirit gradually condensed, starting from the Void and condensing.

During this period, although there were many mistakes, those extradimensional resources forcibly reversed the mistakes, allowing the Eternal Realm Spirit to continue to condense.

Without these extradimensional resources that help increase the chance of breakthrough, a single mistake will completely fail to break through.

That's where these resources are precious.

In short, the resources he used were enough to give his cultivation almost an eighty percent chance of breaking through to the peak realm god realm, if he still failed to break through like this, it would mean that his luck was too bad.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Eternal Realm Spirit was already extremely condensed, and it was about to be completely formed.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, and the tenth Eternal Realm Spirit was completely condensed successfully.

At this moment, his Eternal Dao Seed began to transform, his physical body was also transforming, and his breath was constantly surging.

And with the assistance of extradimensional resources, his eternal Dao species will not fall into a period of weakness, and once he breaks through, his strength will skyrocket.

Of course, his strength will not skyrocket too much, after all, most of his current combat power is in the power of the super dimension and the super dimensional technique and the super dimensional secret treasure, and the proportion of cultivation and physical body is not high, and even if this aspect skyrockets significantly, the power of the super dimension will not increase, and the power of the super dimensional technique will not increase too much.

Therefore, his combat effectiveness will not be exaggerated.

If the increase in combat power is too exaggerated, the original Yonghao Realm God will not be killed by him!

After a period of time, Ye Tian's physical body and eternal Dao seed had already completed their transformation.

He is now a true peak realm god, but there is still a period of rapid improvement, and he can still improve some of his strength.

However, when he reached the peak realm of divine cultivation and fused with extra-dimensional things, even if he continued to condense the eternal realm spirit in the future, the increase in cultivation would not be too exaggerated, and it was impossible to increase his strength many times as before.

Even after condensing twelve Eternal Realm (AFCF) spirits, and condensing one more Eternal Realm spirit, the increase in strength may be very small.

This is also the reason why many peak realm gods are not in a hurry to condense the thirteenth eternal realm spirit, but focus on comprehending the power of the extradimensional.

Comprehending the power of the transcendent dimension is a hundred times more important than condensing the thirteenth eternal realm spirit.

Of course.

Ye Tian still wanted to condense more Eternal Realm Spirits, so that the foundation would be more stable and the potential would be higher.

It's a pity that when it comes to the peak realm god cultivation, it will be extremely difficult to refine the eternal Dao species, and the resources that need to be consumed will be more, and the peak realm god cultivation of many supreme forces does not know how many extradimensional eras, but in the end, only ten eternal realm spirits or eleven eternal realm spirits have been condensed, and there are only a handful of peak realm gods who have condensed two eternal realm spirits.

Perhaps they put most of their energy on fusing extra-dimensional things and suppressing the extra-dimensional assimilation effects of extradimensional things on their bodies, and they didn't put much resources on improving the Eternal Dao Species, but it was enough to prove the difficulty of refining the Eternal Dao Species.

"Fortunately, the extra-dimensional resources can still refine my Eternal Dao Seed, and I don't have to worry about the problem that the Eternal Dao Seed cannot be refined. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In short, as long as there are enough resources, he can refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit.

Therefore, there is no need to worry about improving cultivation, at most it is a matter of time.

"Those super dimensional secret treasures will also take time to repair. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In order to fight against the Yonghao Realm Gods before, he caused many super dimensional secret treasures to be seriously damaged, and those star-winged six-armed shields were seriously damaged.

Moreover, many of his copied bodies had been maintaining the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and he had to spend time refining the Eternal Dao Seed and improving his cultivation, so he had no time to repair these Transcendent Secret Treasures.

So, in the years that followed, he worked hard to repair the Super Dimensional Treasure.

Repairing the Secret Treasure of the Extra-Dimensional Treasure only takes some extra-dimensional materials and some time, but nothing else.

Of course, no matter how you repair the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, there must be some differences in the intact Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, and the power will be a little worse, but the impact is not great.

"It seems that in the future, we need to prepare some super secret treasures, the more the better!"

Ye Tian said darkly. []

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

And during this period of time, the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array has been open, but in this way, the connection with the outside world has also been broken.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to stop urging the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, after all, Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace had already negotiated and reconciled with him, and he would not do it for the time being, plus he had made a breakthrough in cultivation, and he was not afraid of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

Even if Taihao Tianchao Palace poured out of the nest and copied his body with those peak realm gods he was now having, he was sure to fight with his own strength, and even kill Taihao Tianchao Palace.

Whoa!!!

The light of the Star Dimension Void Heavenly Array was removed, and many Terrans finally came out of the Terran Endless Realm Alliance, exploring and wandering away from other places.

And this scene was also known to other supreme forces, and at this moment, these supreme forces finally determined that the gods of the Yonghao realm had really fallen.

For a moment, the strength of the human race surprised these supreme forces.

And the information that Ye Tian broke through the peak realm god could not be concealed, and if he sensed it a little, he would find that Ye Tian's cultivation had broken through.

......

Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

When some peak realm gods learned that Ye Tian's cultivation had broken through and reached the peak realm gods, their faces changed one by one.

Ye Tian, who was cultivating at the time of the high-level peak realm gods, had killed the Yonghao realm gods and them, and now that the cultivation had broken through, their strength must have increased a lot, so they were not opponents.

And Ye Tian must have recovered now, if Ye Tian had just finished killing the Yonghao Realm God and was in a weak period, they would have been able to break through the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and there would still be hope to kill Ye Tian, but now there is no hope at all.

"From today onwards, you must not provoke the Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

These peak realm gods secretly said in their hearts.

As a result, Taihao Tianchao Palace became low-key, only concentrating on exploring in the Death Void and looking for extradimensional resources.
